member.summary: Adapter to bridge the custom IHttpClientFactory interface with the standard .NET HttpClientFactory

member.summary: Creates an HttpClient using the standard .NET HttpClientFactory

member.name: P:Kartverket.Metadatakatalog.Models.Api.SearchParameters.orderby
member.summary: Limits the list to facets. Ex. &facets[0]name=organization&facets[0]value=Kartverket. Facets result is grouped by "theme" , "type", "organization".
Field to order by, ex: orderby=title, default order is score desc.

member.name: T:Resources.UI
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Resources.UI.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Resources.UI.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:Resources.UI.AboutGeonorge
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Om Geonorge.

member.name: P:Resources.UI.AboutMapCatalog
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Her gis oversikt over datasett i Geonorge med opplysninger om tilgjengelige formater, tilknyttede tjenester og API-er..

member.name: P:Resources.UI.AboutTheSite
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Om nettstedet.

member.name: P:Resources.UI.AccessConstraints
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Tilgangsrestriksjoner.

member.name: P:Resources.UI.Add
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Legg.

member.name: P:Resources.UI.AddedToBasket
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Lagt til nedlasting.

member.name: P:Resources.UI.AddToBasket
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Legg til nedlasting.

member.name: P:Resources.UI.AddToMap
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Legg til i kart.

member.name: P:Resources.UI.AllMapData
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Alle kartdata.

member.name: P:Resources.UI.AlreadyPutInBasket
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Allerede lagt til nedlasting.

member.name: P:Resources.UI.ApisAndServices
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to API-er og tjenester.

member.name: P:Resources.UI.APIsAndServicesText
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to API-er og tjenester er maskinlesbare grensesnitt over kartdata og dokumentasjon. Disse brukes i mange internett-løsninger for å oppdatere informasjonen kontinuerlig..

member.name: P:Resources.UI.AppPageTitle
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Kartkatalogen.

member.name: P:Resources.UI.Approved
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Godkjent.

member.name: P:Resources.UI.Area
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to område.

member.name: P:Resources.UI.AreaHelpText
member.summary:
Looks up a localized string similar to

Her kan du velge ferdige filer fra faste områder fra nedtrekklista.

For noen datasett kan du også bruke kartverktøyet for å velge data fra rutenett eller definere fritt valgt polygon for nedlastning.

For fritt valgt polygon vil filen bli generert og du vil få melding på e-post når fila er ferdig for nedlastning.

.

member.name: P:Resources.UI.AreaMustBeSelectedFirst
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Område må velges først.

member.name: P:Resources.UI.Areas
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to områder.

member.name: P:Resources.UI.Articles
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Artikler.

member.name: P:Resources.UI.ASolutionBy
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to En løsning fra.

member.name: P:Resources.UI.AvailableAs
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Tilgjengelig som.

member.name: P:Resources.UI.ErrorReport
member.summary:
Looks up a localized string similar to

Feilen er logget og vil sjekkes av systemansvarlig.

Du kan også rapportere feilen til post@norgedigitalt.no.

.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Tjenestelag.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Applikasjon.

member.name: P:Resources.UI.FileDownload
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Filnedlastning.

member.name: P:Resources.UI.FileDownloadDownload
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Filnedlastning - nedlastning.

member.name: P:Resources.UI.FileDownloadIntro
member.summary:
Looks up a localized string similar to

Nedlastning av filer krever at du velger område, format, og koordinatsystem for hvert datasett.

Skal det lastes ned flere filer, kan det gjøres fellesvalg øverst. Individuelle valg kan gjøres for hvert datasett.

Symboler angir om data ut fra ditt valg er tilgjengelig.

Dersom område ikke vises i fellesvalg, må det velges individuelt for datasettene til nedlasting.

.

member.name: P:Resources.UI.FileDownloadOrder
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Filnedlastning - bestilling.

member.name: P:Resources.UI.FilterSearch
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Filtrer søket på.

member.name: P:Resources.UI.FormatHelpText
member.summary:
Looks up a localized string similar to

Stedfestet informasjon gjøres tilgjengelig på ulike formater avhengig av type datasett. Det kreves spesialverktøy for å lese de fleste formatene.

SOSI – norsk utvekslingsformat for stedfestet informasjon.

GML – internasjonalt XML-format for stedfestet informasjon.

.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Formater.

member.name: P:Resources.UI.MapServicesText
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Mange fagetater, fylkesetater og kommuner tilbyr nettkart til bruk for publikum. Her kan du utforske for eksempel flyfoto, høydedata, arealplaner eller ulike temakart..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to ikke angitt.

member.name: P:Resources.UI.OfflineData
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Skjermede data.

member.name: P:Resources.UI.OpenData
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Åpne data.

member.name: P:Resources.UI.OpenDataText
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to De fleste kartdata i Norge er åpne data. Disse kan du laste ned gratis fra Geonorge, hvilket gir store muligheter for innovasjon og bruk. Datasettets lisens beskriver hva du har lov til å gjøre med dataene..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Bestill mer.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Org. nr..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Personvern og bruk av cookies.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Vi trenger eposten din for å kunne sende deg link når pakken er klar.

member.name: P:Resources.UI.PrivacyEmailRequiredCropping
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Vi trenger eposten din for å kunne sende deg link til datasettet når det er ferdig klippet.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Prosesshistorie.

member.name: P:Resources.UI.Projection
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Projeksjon.

member.name: P:Resources.UI.ProjectionHelpText
member.summary:
Looks up a localized string similar to

Her angir du ønsket koordinatsystem for datasett som skal lastes ned.

Hvis du ønsker data for hele landet, er det vanlig å bruke EUREF89, UTM sone 33.

.
